problem id: 2fc9fc75
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(3) XOR SHR(6)) AND ROT(4)

examples:
  11011000 -> 10000001
  10111111 -> 11111010
  01001010 -> 00000000
  00010001 -> 00000000
  11000101 -> 00001000
  00011000 -> 10000000
  01100101 -> 00000000
  01011101 -> 11000001
  00000111 -> 00110000

query: 01001001
predicted answer: 00000000
